description: The RadiantDashStateSync component is a userspace component that grabs the current dash component in the userspace world and cross synchronizes its values with the dash.

fields.IsFreeform: Whether the userspace dash is set to freeform movement.
fields.IsOpen: Whether the userspace dash is currently open.
fields.Curvature: What the curvature of the dash is currently.

usage: Best used when attached to an item that will exist on the dash, like a facet.
